title: hordeum europaeum
intro: Hordeum europaeum, also known as European barley, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of European barley include lowering cholesterol levels, regulating blood sugar levels, and improving heart health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. European barley can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
